title: Resource Pack Maker
description: A modpack to easily create resource pack
body:
# Resource Pack Maker

This modpack includes many mods designed to help you create a resource pack easily. You can simply modify your assets (inside the resource pack directory), save them, and the changes are applied instantly!
It also includes several performance mods to keep the game running smoothly in the background while you're editing your assets.

## ✨ Features

### 🔄 Automatically refresh on save

Thanks to **Hot Reload Resource Packs**, whenever a file is changed in your `resourcepacks` directory, the game assets are refreshed automatically. And with **Remove Reloading Screen**, you no longer get stuck on the loading screen during reloads.

### 📈 An optimized modpack 🔧

This modpack is also optimized for better performance when running in the background, ensuring it doesn't impact your PC too much.

### 🔧 Recommendation

For basic (2D assets), I recommend using VSCode with the [Luna Paint](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=Tyriar.luna-paint) extension.

To optimize your assets, I recommend using [Sqoosh](https://squoosh.app/) (with OxyPNG to compression)
